description: Upwork, formerly Elance-oDesk, is an American freelancing platform. Upwork connects businesses with independent professionals and agencies around the globe.
contributions: Made a clone of this game https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.game.ball.push

description: Freelancer is a marketplace where employers and employees are able to find each other.
contributions: Made a sprite stretchable in Unity.
Implemented a feature in an existing Unity project which showed shortest path using Line Renderer in realtime by applying A* Search algorithm.
